site.title: Cabo Cleaning | Luxury Villa Care & Butler Service in Los Cabos
site.description: Premium villa cleaning, butler service, and breakfast preparation in Los Cabos. Trusted by villa owners in Pedregal, Palmilla, Quivira, Cabo del Sol, and Querencia.

hero.headline: Luxury Villa Care, Authentic Mexican Hospitality
hero.subheadline: Premium cleaning, butler service, and breakfast preparation for the finest villas in Los Cabos.

trustSignals.localDesc: Based in Los Cabos, we know every neighborhood
trustSignals.freeVisitDesc: No cost, no obligation site visit

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Everything your villa needs to deliver a five-star guest experience

villaCleaning.title: Villa Cleaning
villaCleaning.description: Complete cleaning with hotel-grade standards. Every surface, every corner — spotless. We use eco-friendly, non-toxic products safe for your guests and your property.

butler.title: Butler Service
butler.description: A certified butler who anticipates every need. From welcoming guests to coordinating services — your villa runs like a five-star resort.

breakfast.title: Breakfast Service
breakfast.description: Fresh, beautifully presented breakfasts prepared in your villa. Mexican specialties and international classics — tailored to your guests' preferences.

deepCleaning.title: Deep Cleaning
deepCleaning.description: Post-construction, seasonal, or move-in/move-out deep cleaning. We restore your villa to pristine condition from top to bottom.

turnover.title: Airbnb & VRBO Turnover
turnover.description: Fast, reliable turnover cleaning synced to your booking calendar. Your property is always guest-ready for the next five-star review.

team.title: The Team Behind Cabo Cleaning
team.subtitle: Real people. Real credentials. Real care for your villa.

marlon.name: Marlon
marlon.bio: With 9+ years of experience in ultra-luxury hospitality, Marlon has served the most discerning guests at world-class resorts. He brings that same standard of excellence to every villa he cares for.

cecilia.name: Cecilia
cecilia.bio: Cecilia ensures every detail is perfect — from the crispness of the linens to the presentation of every surface. Her eye for detail transforms a clean villa into a welcoming home.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, transparent, reliable — in four easy steps

step1.title: 1. You Reach Out
step1.description: Send us a message via WhatsApp or our contact form. Tell us about your villa and what you need.

step2.title: 2. Free Site Visit
step2.description: We visit your villa at no cost. We assess the space, understand your needs, and answer every question.

step3.title: 3. Custom Proposal
step3.description: You receive a detailed, transparent quote tailored to your villa and service requirements.

step4.title: 4. Five-Star Service
step4.description: We start caring for your villa. You and your guests experience hotel-grade service — every single time.

testimonials.title: What Villa Owners Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by property owners across Los Cabos

contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Villa
contact.subtitle: Every great stay starts with a clean, welcoming home. Let us take care of yours.
contact.name: Your Name
contact.message: Tell us about your villa and what you need
